questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: What comes in place of question mark (?) in the series given below? 1, 2, 10, 37, 101, ?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: What replaces the question mark (?) in the following number series? 2, 3, 5, 7, 11, ?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: What replaces question mark (?) in the series given below? 88, 64, 24, ?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: What comes in place of question mark (?) in the given number series? 4, 24, 6, 48, 8, 80, ?

solutions.solution: In the given series, following pattern is used. 1→2→10→37→101→(226). The pattern shows: +(1)³, +(2)³, +(3)³, +(4)³, +(5)³. Therefore ? = 226
Each next element is the next prime number. 2→3→5→7→11→(13). Prime number after 2, Prime number after 3, Prime number after 5, Prime number after 7, Prime number after 11. Therefore ? = 13
In the given series, following pattern is used. 88→64→24→(8). The pattern shows: 8×8, 6×4, 2×4. Therefore ? = 8
In the given series, following pattern is used. 4→24→6→48→8→80→(10). The pattern shows: 4×6, 6×8, 8×10 with +2 increment. Therefore ? = 10
